zh.Market Bosworth, Hinkley & Bosworth, Lei: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bosworth於大約1501年在英國諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可受洗時，他的父親Robert Bosworth33歲，母親Ann Martin32歲。他於1524年與Alice Kennedy在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年1月1日在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年52歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Bosworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Husbands Bosworth in Leicestershire (Baresworde in Domesday Book) from an Old English personal name, Bār (from bār ‘boar’) + worth ‘enclosure’, and possibly also from Market Bosworth in Leicestershire, so named with an Old English personal name Bōsa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bosworth was christened about 1501, in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Robert Bosworth, was 33 and his mother, Ann Martin, was 32. He married Alice Kennedy in 1524, in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 January 1552, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bosworth a été baptisé environ 1501, à Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bosworth, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ann Martin, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice Kennedy en 1524, à Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1552, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bosworth um 1501 in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Robert Bosworth 33 und seine Mutter Ann Martin 32. Er hat 1524 in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Kennedy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1552 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Kennedy nel 1524, nel Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 gennaio 1552, nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bosworthが約1501年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコッテスブルークで洗礼を受けた時，父Robert Bosworthは33歳，母Ann Martinは32歳であった。1524年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコッテスブルークでAlice Kennedyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年1月1日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで52歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコッテスブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bosworth(이)가 대략 1501년 영국 노르섬프토실르 컷스브룩에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bosworth(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Martin(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 컷스브룩에서 Alice Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 1월 1일 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 컷스브룩에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Alice Kennedy em 1524, em Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1552, em Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bosworth был крещен около 1501 г. в местности коттесбрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Bosworth было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Martin, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Kennedy в 1524 г. в местности коттесбрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 января 1552 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности коттесбрук, нортамптоншир, Англия.
